title: "Free AI Startup Guide by Menlo Ventures Investor" | Henry Shi ...
full_text:
We’ve built billion-dollar companies (Glean, Super.com), invested in 100+ AI startups, and mentored 200+ AI founders. So we turned our insights into the ultimate AI guide.
Deedy Das (Investor at Menlo Ventures, invested in Anthropic) and I created something that will fundamentally change startup building:
The ultimate guide with specific tool recommendations and step-by-step instructions on how to launch a lean AI-Native company in 2025.
Most startup guides are 100+ pages of academic fluff with zero actionable advice, hopelessly outdated for the AI revolution happening right now.
Moreover, they confuse you with dozens of options, with no clear and direct recommendations.
From our experience, we know the best founders don't get stuck in analysis paralysis (and after reading this, neither will you).
They start building immediately with a proven toolkit because they know that the right tools can replace entire $500K+ departments.
So we co-created a definitive guide for portfolio companies and founders who kept asking us:
"What exact tools would you use to build a unicorn if you started over today?"
This intelligence is worth millions. VCs hoard it. Consultants sell it for $10,000+.
But we don’t want to gatekeep to ourselves or select founders in our network, so we are sharing it for free.
Because frankly, we don't want the next generation of founders spending time comparing 23 hosting providers when they should be talking to customers and shipping products that change the world.
We are giving you crystal-clear recommendations and proven options for business tools covering every single function.
This is the exact guide I wish I had when I started Super.com 8 years ago.
It would have saved me 2 years and probably $2M in wrong decisions.
Inside our Lean AI-native Startup guide, you get:
• Step-by-step guidance from incorporation to first sale
• Curated tool recommendations (not overwhelming lists)
• Battle-tested insights from 100+ investments
• The exact playbook we'd use to start lean AI companies today
• Everything you need to eliminate decision paralysis
This guide compiles insights from 100+ successful startups (Menlo Ventures portfolio companies and Lean AI startups that generate an average of ~$2.5M+ revenue/employee).
So if you are serious about building something iconic, grab it NOW (link in the comments).
PS: If you think this could benefit founders in your network, consider reposting so we can help more entrepreneurs build the next generation of AI Native companies. | 57 comments on LinkedIn

Deedy Das (Investor at Menlo Ventures, invested in Anthropic) and I created something that will fundamentally change startup building:
The ultimate guide with specific tool recommendations and step-by-step instructions on how to launch a lean AI-Native company in 2025.
Most startup guides are 100+ pages of academic fluff with zero actionable advice, hopelessly outdated for the AI revolution happening right now.
